name: SonarQube

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - test       # Trigger SonarQube analysis on push to the test branch
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - test       # Trigger SonarQube analysis on PR to the test branch

jobs:
  sonar:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Check out code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up JDK 17
      uses: actions/setup-java@v2
      with:
        java-version: '17'

    - name: SonarQube Scan
      uses: SonarSource/sonarcloud-github-action@master
      env:
        SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }}
